_comment: Human-curated source for the public version feed. scripts/release-kit.sh injects schema/generated/latest from VERSION + image-manifest.yaml + RELEASE_DATE and merges the two fields below. Edit minimum_secure when a security release raises the floor; prepend a new advisory to advisories[] when one is published. The generated, signed dist/version-feed.json + .sig are deployed to lucairn-website/public/.well-known/.

advisories.summary: Security remediations across the dsa-* service images (S1-S6).
